div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Ambassador in the United Kingdom (Winant)
div.p:
3898. Embs 4554, May 5. In San Francisco the Secretary spokeOn May 11. The Secretary was participating in the United Nations Conference on International Organization which met at San Francisco from April 25 to June 26, 1945. For documentation on this Conference, see vol. i, pp. 1 ff. to Anthony EdenAnthony Eden, British Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs. in presence of CadoganSir Alexander Cadogan, British Permanent Under Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs. and Nevile ButlerNevile M. Butler, British Assistant Under Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs.
regarding Saudi Arabian telecommunications matter. Mr. Eden who is now in London stated he would give matter his personal attention and hoped to be able to have a reply favorable to our desires.
Please continue to follow this matter closely bearing in mind necessity of having Saudi Arabian Government make known to Cable and Wireless nature of proposed modification before first of June.
